content: in british columbia, if i am involved in a vehicle accident with another driver, what information am i required to provide to the other driver?

If I am involved in a car accident in British Columbia, I am required to provide my insurance information to the other driver. I am also required to notify the other driver if either I or my passenger has any injuries as a result of the accident.

content: SECTION 147 OF THE MOTOR VEHICLE ACT is in regards to schools and playgrounds, what section of the motor vehicle act states this information must be provided to the other driver?

content: Section 147 of the Motor Vehicle Act
